'''yangovo''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Nouns|noun]] meaning "[[Wikt:moai|moai]] (auto-generated)". It has inherent '''female''' gender.

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| y-ng-v
|-
! Word class
| [[Noun]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:moai|moai]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Inherent gender
| female
|-
! Citation form
| yangovo
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:yængeveth|yængeveth]] || [[word:yængevej|yængevej]] || [[word:yængevesh|yængevesh]] || [[word:yængeve|yængeve]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:yangongovoth|yangongovoth]] || [[word:yangongovoj|yangongovoj]] || [[word:yangongovosh|yangongovosh]] || [[word:yangongovo|yangongovo]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:yangovoth|yangovoth]] || [[word:yangovoj|yangovoj]] || [[word:yangovosh|yangovosh]] || [[word:yangovo|yangovo]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:yangofvoth|yangofvoth]] || [[word:yangofvoj|yangofvoj]] || [[word:yangofvosh|yangofvosh]] || [[word:yangofvof|yangofvof]]
|}

''16 forms generated.''

== Case paradigm ==
''Shown for female singular.''
{| class="wikitable"
! Case !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[Agent]] || [[word:yangovotho|yangovotho]] || [[word:yangovojo|yangovojo]] || [[word:yangovosho|yangovosho]] || [[word:yangovoko|yangovoko]]
|-
| [[Patient]] || [[word:yangovoth|yangovoth]] || [[word:yangovoj|yangovoj]] || [[word:yangovosh|yangovosh]] || [[word:yangovo|yangovo]]
|-
| [[Possessive]] || [[word:yangovothol|yangovothol]] || [[word:yangovojol|yangovojol]] || [[word:yangovoshol|yangovoshol]] || [[word:yangovokol|yangovokol]]
|-
| [[Instrumental]] || [[word:yangovothotho|yangovothotho]] || [[word:yangovojojo|yangovojojo]] || [[word:yangovoshosho|yangovoshosho]] || [[word:yangovoko|yangovoko]]
|-
| [[Dative]] || [[word:yangovothon|yangovothon]] || [[word:yangovojon|yangovojon]] || [[word:yangovoshon|yangovoshon]] || [[word:yangovokon|yangovokon]]
|-
| [[Speaker]] || [[word:yangovothoro|yangovothoro]] || [[word:yangovojoro|yangovojoro]] || [[word:yangovoshoro|yangovoshoro]] || [[word:yangovokoro|yangovokoro]]
|}

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki nouns]]
[[Category:Aelaki female nouns]]
[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|5390c6a}}
